title: Highly regrettable trading strategy
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls governance functions with flash loaned funds in the same tx.

red_flags: Using unrealized profit to drain lending pools
summary: Avraham Eisenberg manipulated the price of Mango’s governance token, MNGO, and used the profits to drain the protocol’s lending pools. A guard could have blocked transactions calling governance functions with flash loaned funds.
